name: Keiyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Keiyo Co., Ltd. operates and manages a chain of home center stores in Japan. The company's home center stores offer hardware, tools, wood and building materials, paints, gardening products, garden plants, automotive related goods, leisure goods, pet products, soft and hard furnishings, kitchen supplies and tableware, bathroom products, cleaning goods, clothing products, household goods, health and beauty goods, curtains, lightning and household electronics, home electronics, and medicines. As of February 28, 2019, it operated a network of 177 stores. The company was formerly known as Keiyo Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Keiyo Co., Ltd. in April 1979. Keiyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Chiba, Japan.
